comments.post_body: My team, the Computer Vision and Machine Learning algorithms group at Amazon Lab126 is looking for Research Scientists and Software Engineers at all levels. Our  group is responsible for research and development of novel computer vision and machine learning ideas that go into upcoming Amazon devices and services. Ping me if you are interested!

comments.post_body: Are you looking for a new career in 2016?  I'm beginning to look for candidates within Industrial Engineering, Process Engineering, Advanced Manufacturing, Project Engineering, and Quality Engineering,  Please contact me today and I am more than happy to speak with you to see if you would be a potential fit for these roles.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about potential job opportunities in engineering fields, and the original post is seeking candidates for various engineering roles. The post invites interested individuals to contact the author to discuss potential fits for these positions.

comments.post_body:
I’m hiring machine learning and computer vision engineers!

A well-respected biomedical research group in NYC is looking to bring on a computer vision expert to take ownership of their biomedical image processing operations. This is a senior, hands-on engineering role, where you will have the opportunity to work with some of the top medical and academic leaders within this industry.  

data@connectionsny.com
comments.context_summary: The commenter is hiring machine learning and computer vision engineers for a biomedical research group in NYC, specifically a senior computer vision expert to lead biomedical image processing operations. The role offers the opportunity to work with top medical and academic leaders in the industry.
